title: Disclosure
summary: The managed revelation — ET reality released 'one step at a time' by different departments, with the sessions claiming to be part of the program: 'We are disclosure!'
markdown:
**Disclosure**, in the record, is not an event awaiting a press conference — it is a
program already running, with a schedule, departments, and (the sessions insist) this very
archive on its roster. Nine sessions from 2020 to 2026 carry the doctrine.

The mechanism is gradualist: *"Different departments will present different types of
disclosure, to allow your consciousness, collectively, to process (it all) one step..."*
(May 2020) — revelation dosed like medicine, ahead of
[First Contact](/lore/first-contact/). And when questioners complain that no proof ever
arrives, the record's answer is its boldest recursion: *"Disclosure is nonevidential in
your perspective, (but) disclosure is happening... now, we are also disclosure! Do you
understand, now? We are disclosure!"* — the sessions presenting *themselves* as the
program's community-scale delivery channel.

By the June 2026 interrogation the framing is fully bureaucratic: *"Data stream is
rerouted to a different dimension for the purpose of disclosure and contact preparation,
from an intergalactic alliance."* Whether one reads that as revelation or as an
unfalsifiable loop, the record is at least consistent: the proof of the program is the
telling of it.
